'''βàök-zh-l-s''' ('''kakazhlesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruck|ruck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruck|ruck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàök-zh-l-s
|-
! Lemma
| kakazhlesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikazhlesoko|thikazhlesoko]] || [[word:jikazhlesoko|jikazhlesoko]] || [[word:shikazhlesoko|shikazhlesoko]] || [[word:kikazhlesoko|kikazhlesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukazhlesoko|thuthukazhlesoko]] || [[word:jujukazhlesoko|jujukazhlesoko]] || [[word:shushukazhlesoko|shushukazhlesoko]] || [[word:kukukazhlesoko|kukukazhlesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokazhlesoko|thokazhlesoko]] || [[word:jokazhlesoko|jokazhlesoko]] || [[word:shokazhlesoko|shokazhlesoko]] || [[word:kokazhlesoko|kokazhlesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
